## Checklist

- [ ] Component follows [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) conventions
- [ ] All components use `forwardRef` and export Props types
- [ ] CVA variants defined for visual components
- [ ] `cn()` used for all className composition
- [ ] No hardcoded colors (uses CSS variable tokens)
- [ ] No inline styles
- [ ] No `any` types
- [ ] Accessibility: ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Storybook stories added/updated
- [ ] Changeset added (if applicable): `pnpm changeset`
